DEFENDANT DHARMA BAJPAI's Motion For Entry Of The Following As Orders Of Court: (1) Stipulation For Division Of 401(K) Plan And Qualified Domestic Relations Order (Bank Of America 401(K) Plan); (2) Stipulation.

The motion is denied as moot. The request was referred to the Unified Family Court and the honorable Roger Chan has signed the order.
